examples: An ultrasonic apparatus for treating leukoderma is disclosed.
Methods 40 cases of leukoderma including vitiligo, pregnancy stretch marks and hypopigmentative scars were treated with UVB.
The results showed that the most common was verruca senilis (37.96%), followed by angioma senilis, leukoderma, guttata, alopecia, xeroderma and longitudinal crest of nails.
